title: Citrusy Gooey Uruguayan Grapes Crumble
description: This jain-friendly citrusy and gooey crumble is perfect for post-workout snacking or as a dessert after meals, featuring grapes baked with spices like cinnamon and cloves to enhance the natural sweetness of the fruit.

ingredients.name: 3 cups golden grapes, halved and seeded

instructions: Soak raisins in water for 1 hour. Drain and set aside.
Combine orange juice, lime juice, soaked raisins, golden grapes, cinnamon, cloves, sugar, flour, and melted butter in a large mixing bowl. Mix well until the mixture is moist but not too wet.
Press half of the fruit mixture into an ungreased 8x8 inch baking dish. Pour remaining mixture over it evenly.
Bake for 20 minutes or until golden brown and bubbly on top. Serve warm as a dessert or snack.
